name: parasxos/claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace for Paris Moschovakos.

plugins.name: cpp26-adapter
plugins.description: Turn Claude into a C++26 specialist — reflection, contracts, senders, #embed, expansion statements. Standard-first: suggests the C++26 form even when clang/gcc lag.

plugins.name: speak
plugins.description: On-demand text-to-speech for Claude Code on macOS via Ava (Premium). Markdown-aware, length-capped, kill-previous, mute-file gated. Triggered by /speak, /read, or natural phrases.

plugins.name: session-rename
plugins.description: Give your Claude Code sessions meaningful names so you can recognise them at a glance — especially useful when running several agents or coding sessions in parallel. Asks Haiku for a 3-6 word name from the recent transcript turns and patches sessions/<pid>.json so the UI label updates. Subscription-authed (scrubs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). Triggered by /session-rename, /rename, or natural phrases.
